capabilities_used.evidence: 反复直接使用 FVG 术语：2025-06-26 写“H1 FVG + H4 SFP+OB confluence”；2025-07-26 写“price fills more of the imbalance (blue box) before heading for new highs”；图 5 直接标注“H1 FVG”“D1 FVG”，图 4/5 也都在用 imbalance box 作为路径锚点。
多次把 OB 当成核心入场区：2025-06-26“H4 SFP+OB confluence”；2024-05-31“$TAO - Price currently is at H12 FVG + D1 OB + Monthly open”；图 5 顶部粉色供给区直接标“H4 OB”。

他极常说“sweep/liquidity swept”：2025-09-18“Liquidity Swept ✅”；2025-11-27“Mid term target for price is these two lows being swept”；2025-11-07“Quick sweep of $98.1k liq to long”；图 4 用 pre week high / low 画出明显流动性池，路径先扫低点再上。
直接点名 SFP：2025-06-26“H4 SFP+OB confluence”；2024-12-29“$ETH ... laying in a D1 SFP at the premium of this macro...”；这说明他把前高/前低假突破后的反转当成常用触发器。
他频繁用 breaker 概念：2024-03-26“perfect bullish retest of the weekly breaker”；2024-11-30“Price has a H12 breaker, H4 iFVG + FVG”；说明其结构框架不止普通支撑阻力，而是带 ICT/SMC breaker 逻辑。
斐波尤其 0.618/0.75 用得很多：2026-02-20“0.75 fib of the entire 2022 - 2025 rally”；2025-11-27“reacting of off 0.618 (GP) of the '25 rally”；图 4 直接写“0.5 (119,500.0)”，图表里经常把 fib 当结构共振。

均线收复/EMA trend 是明确触发条件：2025-09-29“trigger for longs ... a flip of $112k and green EMA trend”；2025-09-29“$105k/$107.2k liq looks like a very clean long with D200EMA as support”；说明他会用 EMA 作为结构确认，而不是单独指标交易。

他很爱定义 no trade zone / chop season：2025-09-22“pretty much a no trade zone”；2024-12-22“Boring choppy PA until EOY Don’t over trade”；2026-03-30“Price continues to chop around in my no trade zone”；图 4 也是典型 level-to-level 区间路线图。

极强调等确认，不接刀：2026-02-15“All major bounces are for shorting... Bottoms take months to form, not days.”；2025-04-22“How many times has fomoing into resistance ever worked for you?”；图 1 TAO 暴跌配文“TAO is nuking. Any news?!”也体现他对瀑布行情先观察而非盲接。
他明确自称 4 年周期信徒：2025-09-29“As a subscriber of the 4 year cycle I believe we are very close.”；2025-11-27/2025-12-28 继续围绕 cycle top、EOY pump、Q4-Q1 进行框架判断。
宏观事件日会主动降频：2025-07-29“In absolutely no rush to enter anything heading into FOMC + Monthly close. A+ setups only.”；2025-10-28“FOMC tomorrow”；2025-01-29“FOMC in 10 mins”；他不是纯新闻交易，但会把 FOMC 当风险过滤器。
他经常把具体 liquidation levels 当作价格磁铁：2025-09-29“$105k/$107.2k liq looks like a very clean long”；2025-08-21“price sweeps $112k liq”；2025-11-07“Quick sweep of $98.1k liq to long”；这是明显的清算流动性路径交易。

他经常做区间两端和 level-to-level：2025-11-27“2024 range levels look pretty clean to trade around imo. Some solid level to level plays can be built here.”；图 4 以 pre week high / pre week low / 0.5 为核心区间边界，典型区间框架。
在确认趋势后会明显偏向顺势做多：2025-04-30“Monthly close setting up phenomenally... new ATH in May”；2025-06-30“Dips are for buying”；2025-04-23“UP ONLY SEASON”；说明他一旦判断 HTF 趋势恢复，会切到强多 regime。
在 bear/breakdown 环境又会切到反弹空：2026-02-15“We are in a bear market and the trend is shouting LOWER. A few green candles don't change that.”；2025-11-27“All big bounces are for shorting IMO”；并非死多头。
虽然很少教科书式讲止损，但经常讲 clean invalidation：2025-09-29“Invaldation is clean.”；2025-07-26“Idea invalidates if price reclaims and holds above 0.5 first.”；这是明显的先定义失效点再交易。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: HTF Level Flip Trigger
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 高周期关键位翻转触发
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Wait for a major higher-timeframe level to flip from resistance to support, or support to resistance, before taking the trade. The flip itself is the trigger; without the flip, there is no trade.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 等待高周期关键位完成阻力变支撑或支撑变阻力，再执行交易。翻转本身就是触发器；没有翻转就不交易。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-07-31“I am only looking for two triggers from price  Flip $119.5k -> New ATH”; 2025-09-29“My trigger for longs ... would be a flip of $112k”; 2025-08-26“Gameplan remains the same -> Flip & Long.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: No Trade Zone Filter
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Explicitly classify broad mid-range or event-heavy conditions as a no-trade zone and stand aside until price reaches a clean trigger area.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把中段区间或事件扰动期明确划为无交易区，直到价格到达清晰触发位才出手。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-09-29“pretty much a no trade zone”; 2024-12-29“Price currently is in no trade zone”; 2026-03-30“no trigger -> no trade.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Weekly Reference Level Map
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use prior week high/low, previous week low, Monday low/open, and half of prior week range as mechanical reference levels for liquidity sweeps and reaction trades.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把前周高低点、前周低点、周一低点/开盘以及前周区间中点作为机械参考位，用于流动性扫单与反应交易。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图 4 标注“Pre week high”“Pre week low”“0.5”；多条推文提 Monday Low、PWL、PYH，如 2025-07-31“Price has reclaimed PWL and is seeking SSL IMO”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Imbalance Fill Then Continue
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Project that price first fills a nearby imbalance/FVG box and only then resumes the dominant higher-timeframe direction.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 预判价格会先回补附近失衡区/FVG，然后再恢复原有高周期方向。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-07-26“I think price fills more of the imbalance (blue box) before heading for new highs.”；图 4 路径先下探蓝/灰不平衡区后再向上冲击前周高点。

personal_quirks.quote: I am only looking for two triggers from price  Flip $119.5k -> New ATH  Fill imbalance till around $113k -> Hammer longs  Everything else is noise
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先把交易简化成极少数高确定性触发器，其余行情全部忽略。

personal_quirks.quote: In absolutely no rush to enter anything heading into FOMC + Monthly close.  A+ setups only.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 宏观事件前主动降频，只做 A+ setup，不为交易而交易。

personal_quirks.quote: All major bounces are for shorting.  We are in a bear market and the trend is shouting LOWER.  A few green candles don't change that.  Bottoms take months to form, not days.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在确认熊市阶段时，不把反弹误判成反转，优先顺大趋势。

personal_quirks.quote: How many times has fomoing into resistance ever worked for you?
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要在阻力位情绪化追多，等待回踩、翻转或失衡回补后的确认。

personal_quirks.quote: Always remember, no trigger -> no trade.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 没有预设触发条件就空仓，空仓本身是有效仓位。

unique_traits: 他和普通裸 K TA 的区别在于，图上不是只画支撑阻力，而是把 ICT/SMC 语言系统化地落到具体交易触发上：FVG、OB、SFP、breaker、liq sweep、周度参考位一起构成路径图。其次，他非常强调“no trade zone”和“flip/trigger”，说明他不是持续给方向的人，而是等待特定结构确认后才出手。最后，他会把 4 年周期、FOMC、Q4 季节性当背景过滤器，但真正执行仍以结构与流动性为核心。

low_conviction_phrases: not very confident on this one
